description: A target-encoded categorical feature was fit on the full dataset, leaking the label into training.
body: Failure mode: a high-cardinality categorical is target-encoded using statistics computed over all rows including validation, so each encoded value carries information about its own label and the model memorizes it. Detection signals: a single encoded feature dominating importance with near-perfect signal, and a metric that collapses when the encoding is recomputed out-of-fold. Do not keep the feature because it looks strong. Safer fallback: recompute target encoding strictly out-of-fold (or with held-out folds), re-benchmark against alternative encodings, and discard any encoding whose lift disappears under out-of-fold computation.
